_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: there was significant reduction in p-Histone 3 levels at 300nM and 1μM treated MPNSTs at both time points
details: Significant reduction in p-Histone 3 levels at 300nM and 1μM treated MPNSTs at both 24hr and 48hr time points.
